text_description:
[SCENESMITH_SCHOOL_CONTRACT_V1 room_id=main_corridor profile=school_reference_20260710]
Immutable effective prompt SHA-256: ac8d297cc9a2d605f41b4bcd7abd52aac29bfd0f195875840342ee1e6a7da86f

Use warm cream/beige/off-white walls, light wood furniture and flooring, soft daylight, warm ceiling light, organized school displays, realistic scale, greenery, and clear humanoid/robot circulation. Nothing may float, visibly interpenetrate, block a door, or eliminate a usable walking/turning path.

ROOM-SPECIFIC REQUIRED CONTENTS:
Create the broad open central circulation/lobby spine with clear sightlines and door clearance. Include at least two benches/seating elements, at least four plants/planters, at least two bulletin/display areas, welcoming school signage, and a clear path to the bottom-center double entrance and library. Preserve wheelchair and humanoid turning space.

--- FLOOR-PLANNER CONTEXT (SECONDARY) ---
Broad central circulation spine connecting every functional room.
